lastSummary: Reviewed the last hour and captured missing durable memory: the pruning mission's formal wrap-up, queued closeout ping, dedicated wrap-up handoff note, and the clean next-session handoff into the canonical 2026-04-10 daily note.

Checked passive work state: git still had no new commits after 10:02's pushed sync, while the hourly market-moving digest worker stayed healthy through the 11:00 AM EDT cycle with installed cron active and 92 observations stored.
Re-reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files against the importance rubric, found no shared-important promotions waiting, and stamped fresh review metadata before rerunning automated sync.
